hvac:diagnostic.summary: Visit/diagnostic fee first; additional labor billed hourly.
notes: Replacement estimate APIs are not used for diagnostic visits.

hvac:system-diagnostic.summary: Visit/diagnostic fee first; additional labor billed hourly.

hvac:replacement.summary: Tonnage-based equipment replacement estimate with markup.

hvac:system-replacement.summary: Tonnage-based equipment replacement estimate with markup.

law-office:divorce.summary: Family-law divorce engagement priced as a retainer-backed matter.
notes: Appearance fees may apply for hearings.

law-office:family-matter.summary: Scoped family-law matter with retainer floor.

law-office:court-appearance.summary: Hearing/appearance fee or billable time, whichever applies.

law-office:initial-consultation.summary: Intake consult with consultation fee floor when configured.

transportation:packing.summary: Packing-only labor and materials (no line-haul fuel/tolls).
notes: Single service address; pickup/dropoff not required.

transportation:loading-only.summary: Loading labor only at a single site.
notes: Single service address; pickup/dropoff not required.

bakery-food:rush-order.summary: Standard bakery formula with rush multiplier.

bakery-food:local-delivery.summary: Delivery fee estimate; may combine with product order pricing.

plumbing:water-heater.summary: Labor plus water-heater install material default.

electrical:ev-charger.summary: Labor plus EV charger install equipment default.
